scope.note: Includes all Top6 failures whose target is strategy_buildcraft or whose Top6 contains a v0.3 added strategy_buildcraft candidate.

failures.diagnosticFinding: Top6 contains 3 v0.3 added strategy games above the target, indicating broad candidate tags are still pulling unrelated seeds upward.
failures.recommendedAction: For v0.3.2, review the candidates above the target and remove only demonstrably over-broad scoring tags from those candidates.

failures.diagnosticFinding: Top6 contains 4 v0.3 added strategy games above the target, indicating broad candidate tags are still pulling unrelated seeds upward.
failures.recommendedAction: For v0.3.2, review the candidates above the target and remove only demonstrably over-broad scoring tags from those candidates.

failures.diagnosticFinding: Top6 contains 5 v0.3 added strategy games above the target, indicating broad candidate tags are still pulling unrelated seeds upward.
failures.recommendedAction: For v0.3.2, review the candidates above the target and remove only demonstrably over-broad scoring tags from those candidates.

failures.diagnosticFinding: The target only matched 3 scoring tags and none of its discriminatorTags are expressible by the current answer tags.
failures.recommendedAction: Do not force global scoring changes. If this pattern repeats, add a v0.4 strategy-specific follow-up question or make the generated seed more specific where the current 12 questions already allow it.

failures.diagnosticFinding: Top6 contains 5 v0.3 added strategy games above the target, indicating broad candidate tags are still pulling unrelated seeds upward.
failures.recommendedAction: For v0.3.2, review the candidates above the target and remove only demonstrably over-broad scoring tags from those candidates.

failures.diagnosticFinding: Top6 contains 2 declared confusable games, so the current transparent tag ranking cannot separate close neighbors for this seed.
failures.recommendedAction: In v0.3.2, inspect the confusable relations first. Do not add algorithmic suppression yet; either tighten confusableWith or add a narrow seed/metadata distinction for the target.
